hero.headline: Classical music, modern community.
hero.subhead: We are dedicated to fostering a vibrant cultural environment, supporting musical education, and ensuring that the joy of orchestral performances is accessible to all.

intro.heading: Bringing live orchestral music to the Eastside.
body: We rehearse weekly and play several concerts a year — symphonies and overtures alongside film scores, video game music, and the occasional K-pop arrangement.
Concerts are free or low-cost on purpose. Bring a friend, bring your family, and we'll see you there.

videos.title: Frieren & Violet Evergarden — Evan Call Orchestral Suite
Rachmaninoff Piano Concerto No. 2 — Jada Campbell
